text: It looks as if there had been an omission made here by a copyist; we should expect to hear that Athaias led the clan of Zara (as opposed to Phares) and to be given some account of their numbers.
The two names here given are most reasonably accounted for by supposing a manuscript defect.

It is difficult to see why a note should have been given here about the duties of the Asaphite clan, but still more difficult, if we put a full stop after Asaph, to make out of the words which follow a sentence relevant to the context.
